31564.title: Mary Berry Cooks : Sunday Lunch
31564.description: Mary cooks for a relaxed and informal family get-together, with dishes including a slow-roast shoulder of lamb with rosemary and paprika rub, potato and fennel gratin, plum tarte tatin and delicious fruit salad.

31565.title: Call the Midwife
31565.description: Valerie tries to help a struggling mother to accept her son's birth defect, and the Turners oversee a measles vaccination trial at the clinic. Meanwhile, Nurse Crane is determined to make the most of the Whitsun bank holiday.

31566.title: Summer of Rockets
31566.description: During the tumultuous summer of 1958, Samuel prepares to launch his new invention, which is attracting some suspicious followers, before meeting the mysterious Kathleen.

31567.title: Father Brown : The House of God
31567.description: Suspicions abound when, in a shocking turn of events, the holiest house in Kembleford is linked to the death of a woman.

31568.title: Call the Midwife
31568.description: Valerie tries to help a struggling mother to accept her son's birth defect, and the Turners oversee a measles vaccination trial at the clinic. Meanwhile, Nurse Crane is determined to make the most of the Whitsun bank holiday.

31571.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway: Private Investigators : This Rough Magic
31571.description: Frank and Lu investigate mysterious goings-on when a woman dies in a magic trick gone gruesomely wrong.

31572.title: Bargain Hunt : Newark 24
31572.description: Natasha Raskin presents from the market town of Newark in Nottinghamshire with experts Kate Bliss and Gary Pe. Two mother-and-daughter teams battle it out, each buying three items to hopefully make a profit at auction.

31573.title: Bad Move : Day Trip
31573.description: Nicky and Steve are missing the city, and fantasise about all the exciting things they could be doing before both experience a bizarre and unusual day.

31574.title: Keeping Up Appearances : Hyacinth Is Alarmed
31574.description: Richard forgets his wedding anniversary but then tells Hyacinth that he had a new alarm installed as an anniversary present, only he has forgotten the code.

31576.title: EastEnders
31576.description: Lola is worried when Isaac tells a lie, Callum confides in the wrong person, Bernie starts to feel the pressure, and Linda knows that the truth will soon be out.

31577.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway: Private Investigators : This Rough Magic
31577.description: Frank and Lu investigate mysterious goings-on when a woman dies in a magic trick gone gruesomely wrong.

31578.title: Bargain Hunt : Newark 24
31578.description: Natasha Raskin presents from the market town of Newark in Nottinghamshire with experts Kate Bliss and Gary Pe. Two mother-and-daughter teams battle it out, each buying three items to hopefully make a profit at auction.

31579.title: Impossible
31579.description: Thirty players compete across the series, scoring points by answering questions correctly. However, they must avoid the impossible answers, otherwise they will be eliminated from the show until the next day.

31580.title: Antiques Roadshow : Erddig 2
31580.description: Fiona Bruce and the experts welcome thousands of visitors to Erddig in north Wales, the home of the Yorke family. Treasures turning up include a mourning ring connected to Charlotte Bronte and a Welsh love spoon handed down through the generations.

31582.description: Richard forgets his wedding anniversary but then tells Hyacinth that he had a new alarm installed as an anniversary present, only he has forgotten the code.

31583.title: Bargain Hunt : Warwick 30
31583.description: Charlie Ross presents from the British Motor Museum in Gaydon, Warwickshire. Former Formula One world champion Damon Hill talks to Charlie about a very special car, whilst the reds and blues motor around the fair with the help of experts Richard Madley and Thomas Plant.

31585.title: EastEnders
31585.description: Lola is worried when Isaac tells a lie, Callum confides in the wrong person, Bernie starts to feel the pressure, and Linda knows that the truth will soon be out.

31586.title: Impossible
31586.description: Thirty players compete across the series, scoring points by answering questions correctly. However, they must avoid the impossible answers, otherwise they will be eliminated from the show until the next day.

31587.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway: Private Investigators : Toil and Trouble
31587.description: A local criminal, Billy `The Brick' Porters is the subject of the village's suspicion when the mayor of Arden is found murdered in his cottage in the dead of night. Lu and Frank try to exonerate criminal.

31588.title: Antiques Roadshow : Erddig 2
31588.description: Fiona Bruce and the experts welcome thousands of visitors to Erddig in north Wales, the home of the Yorke family. Treasures turning up include a mourning ring connected to Charlotte Bronte and a Welsh love spoon handed down through the generations.

31589.title: Bad Move : Party Time
31589.description: Nicky and Steve decide to put a brave face on things and invite all their old friends from Leeds for a long-overdue housewarming party.

31590.title: Keeping Up Appearances : A Riverside Picnic
31590.description: Holding a riverside picnic seems like a good idea, but Hyacinth's arrangements don't go quite as she planned.

31592.title: EastEnders
31592.description: Lola is worried when Isaac tells a lie, Callum confides in the wrong person, Bernie starts to feel the pressure, and Linda knows that the truth will soon be out.

31595.title: Paul Hollywood: A Baker's Life : Pizza, Roulade & Madeira Cake
31595.description: Val and Selasi challenge Paul to bake a delicious pistachio and rose petal roulade. Paul shares his ultimate pizza recipe: a courgette, lemon and thyme bake from Venice.

31597.title: EastEnders
31597.description: Jack has bad news for Stuart and Rainie. Bobby impresses Dana with Zack's help, Isaac's suspicion firmly takes hold, and Callum digs himself deeper as Ben makes a discovery.

31598.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway: Private Investigators : The Envious Court
31598.description: Frank and Lu investigate a death threat at Runningbrook, an exclusive tennis club which hides a toxic threat.

31599.title: Silent Witness : In Plain Sight
31599.description: The accidental fatal shooting of a Polish teenager in an armed police operation triggers a series of murders that link Turkish gangsters, a grieving family and a fractured firearms unit.

31600.title: Father Brown : The Blood of the Anarchists
